problem id: eed2f3ae
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01010100 -> 00101111
  01101010 -> 00010111
  01000010 -> 10110111
  00110000 -> 00111111
  10111001 -> 00111011
  10111000 -> 00011111
  11011010 -> 11010111
  10011011 -> 11110011
  11000000 -> 11111111
  00010010 -> 11110111

query: 01100100
predicted answer: 11101111
